scripts.docker:reset: docker compose down -v && docker compose up --build
scripts.db:migrate: cd apps/api && npx prisma migrate deploy
scripts.db:revision: cd apps/api && npx prisma migrate dev --name
scripts.db:setup: ln -sf ../../.env apps/api/.env && ln -sf ../../.env apps/web/.env && cd apps/api && npm install && npx prisma generate && npx prisma migrate dev
scripts.setup: pnpm install && pnpm db:setup && echo 'Done! Run: pnpm start'
scripts.start: docker compose up redis -d && pnpm dev
